title: Add --sign-by-sq-fingerprint
body:
This is https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2876, integrating with the build system, and it will include new CLI and a smoke test.

<s>Do not merge: Depends on #2681 and https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2876 in c/image.</s>

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Note https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26618#issuecomment-3063657304 :
> I would like to NOT merge this until after we move Podman v5.6 to it's own RHEL branch, probably mid to late August. This should be aimed at Podman v5.7 or 6.0 at the earliest.

I’m not sure what we decide to do, but we should be consistent across projects. Cc: @TomSweeneyRedHat
@mtrmac as we have created a Skopeo 1.20 branch to be used for RHEL 9.7/10.1, I'm fine with moving forward with this now if you wish.

Rebased, and added a commit to update tests for `rust-podman-sequoia` 0.2.0. PTAL.
